requirements.summary: Implement universal hover-to-edit capability across all admin editor panels with inline pencil icons that open edit modals for direct field updates
acceptanceCriteria: In every editor panel (HeroEditor, AboutEditor, ServicesEditor, ReviewsEditor, ClinicsEditor, SocialLinksEditor, FooterEditor), hovering over any displayed field value shows a pencil/edit icon.
Clicking the pencil icon opens an inline input field or small modal pre-filled with the current value.
Saving the inline edit calls the appropriate backend mutation and updates the displayed value without a full page reload.
The existing full-form editor UI remains functional alongside the hover-to-edit shortcut.
The hover-to-edit UI uses the existing glassmorphism aesthetic, blue-purple-magenta palette, and Helvetica font.
The feature works correctly in both light and dark modes.

file_operations.description: Enhance EditableWrapper to support inline editing for multiple field types (text, textarea, number, date, image) with a hover-triggered pencil icon. Add props for field type, current value, onSave callback, and optional validation. Ensure the pencil icon appears on hover with proper glassmorphism styling and works in both light/dark modes.

Extend EditModal to support additional field types including image selection (with ImagePickerModal integration), rating input, and URL input. Add proper validation for each field type and ensure the modal maintains the glassmorphism aesthetic with blue-purple-magenta palette.

Wrap all displayed field values (headline, subheadline, tagline) and the background image thumbnail with EditableWrapper components. Configure each wrapper to open an appropriate EditModal on click, pre-filled with current values. Wire the onSave callbacks to call the backend setHeroSection mutation with updated data. Preserve the existing full-form editor UI alongside the new hover-to-edit shortcuts.

Wrap the bioText display and photo thumbnail with EditableWrapper components. For bioText, use textarea type; for photo, use image type that opens ImagePickerModal. Wire onSave callbacks to call setAboutSection with updated data. Maintain the existing full-form editor functionality.

Wrap each service card's title, description, and icon image with EditableWrapper components. Configure appropriate field types (text for title, textarea for description, image for icon). Wire onSave to update the services array and call setServices. Keep the existing add/remove service buttons functional.

Wrap each review card's patientName, reviewText, rating, and date fields with EditableWrapper components. Use appropriate field types (text, textarea, number for rating 1-5, date). Wire onSave to update the reviews array and call setPatientReviews. Preserve existing add/remove review functionality.

Wrap each clinic card's name, address, phone, mapLink, and photo fields with EditableWrapper components. Use text type for text fields, image type for photo. Wire onSave to update the clinics array and call setClinics. Maintain existing add/remove clinic buttons.

Wrap each social link's platform and url fields with EditableWrapper components using text and url field types respectively. Wire onSave to update the socialLinks array and call setSocialLinks. Keep existing add/remove link functionality.

Wrap all displayed footer field values (practice name, tagline, short description, copyright text, contact email, phone, address, opening hours) with EditableWrapper components. Use appropriate field types (text or textarea). Wire onSave callbacks to call setFooter with the updated DetailedFooter object. Preserve the existing full-form editor UI.

requirements.summary: Redesign Footer component with branded top section, multi-column layout (Quick Links, Contact Info, Opening Hours, Social Links), and bottom bar with copyright and Back to Top button; extend FooterEditor to expose all new editable fields
acceptanceCriteria: The public Footer renders a branded top section showing the practice name, tagline, and short description.

The footer includes a multi-column layout with: Quick Links (scroll to Hero, About, Services, Reviews, Clinics, Follow Us), Contact Info column (email, phone, address with appropriate icons), Opening Hours column (displays editable text from backend), and Social Links column (icons linking to Follow Us entries).
A bottom bar is present with copyright text, a horizontal separator, and a 'Back to Top' button that scrolls to the top of the page.
The FooterEditor in the admin dashboard exposes fields for: practice name, tagline, short description, copyright text, contact email, contact phone, contact address, and opening hours text block.
All FooterEditor fields save successfully to the backend when the admin submits.
The footer renders correctly in both light and dark modes using the existing CSS custom properties.
The footer uses the glassmorphism card aesthetic (frosted glass panels, blue-purple-magenta palette) and Helvetica font.
The footer is fully responsive across mobile (≥320px), tablet (≥768px), and desktop (≥1024px) breakpoints.
The backend DetailedFooter type is extended if necessary to accommodate all new fields (tagline, shortDescription, openingHours, contactEmail, contactPhone, contactAddress).

file_operations.description: Completely redesign Footer to include: (1) a branded top section displaying practice name, tagline, and short description from the DetailedFooter backend type; (2) a responsive multi-column layout with Quick Links column (smooth-scroll links to Hero, About, Services, Reviews, Clinics, Follow Us sections), Contact Info column (email with mail icon, phone with phone icon, address with map-pin icon), Opening Hours column (formatted text block), and Social Links column (platform icons linking to Follow Us entries from the socialLinks prop); (3) a bottom bar with copyright text, horizontal separator, and 'Back to Top' button that scrolls to page top. Use glassmorphism card styling, blue-purple-magenta palette, CSS custom properties for light/dark modes, and Helvetica font. Ensure full responsiveness at mobile (≥320px), tablet (≥768px), and desktop (≥1024px) breakpoints with appropriate column stacking on mobile.

Extend FooterEditor to expose input fields for all DetailedFooter properties: practice name (text), tagline (text), short description (textarea), copyright text (text), contact email (email input), contact phone (tel input), contact address (textarea), and opening hours (textarea). Update the form submission handler to construct a complete DetailedFooter object with all new fields and call the backend setFooter mutation. Ensure all fields are controlled inputs with proper validation. Maintain the glassmorphism aesthetic and responsive layout.

Update the Home page to pass the socialLinks array as a prop to the Footer component, enabling the Social Links column in the footer to render platform icons linking to the Follow Us entries. Ensure the footer receives all necessary data from the content query including the DetailedFooter object and socialLinks array.
